speaker: speaker1
text: Are you ready for the camping trip ?

speaker: speaker2
text: All set . I've got my makeup , my Cds , and my portable TV set ...

speaker: speaker1
text: Hello ! We're supposed to be getting back to nature .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , yeah . Anyway ... I'm packed . Are you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I've been packed for a week . All my stuff is in this backpack .

speaker: speaker2
text: Let me see ... two books ... birdseed ?
